author: chatgpt-codex-connector[bot]
body:
**<sub><sub>![P2 Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/P2-yellow?style=flat)</sub></sub>  Require a kernels version that supports trust_remote_code**

In environments with an existing or locked `kernels` 0.13.x install, this new kwarg makes every fallback attempt fail with an unexpected-keyword error before a hub kernel can load. That version still satisfies the project dependency in `pyproject.toml` (`kernels<0.15.0`, no lower bound), so selecting `FLASH_ATTN_HUB`/`FLASH_ATTN_3_HUB` can regress from working to always raising `RuntimeError`; either guard this argument by API support or raise the dependency lower bound.

Useful? React with 👍 / 👎.
